user.title: reGATE connection
user.description:
Enter the MQTT host (IP) and port of the reGATE.

How to find the IP address:

• From a terminal on your local network:
  `arp -a` then look for a host containing "gatexway".

• From the reGATE app:
  Settings → reGATE information → find the host/IP.

• You can also identify the device by its MAC address in your router/DHCP list.

telemetry.title: Help extend reGATE support
telemetry.description:
Optional opt-in: when a new or unsupported MQTT profile is detected on your installation, Home Assistant can notify you with a **pre-filled GitHub link** (anonymized roles and MQTT key names).

Nothing is sent automatically — you decide whether to open the link. This helps prioritize actuators, schedulers, and new MQTT keys.

You can change this anytime under **reGATE → Configure**.

data.telemetry: Notify me about new or unsupported devices (recommended)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the MQTT broker.
error.invalid_mqtt: Connected to the host but MQTT handshake failed.
error.regate_not_found: MQTT broker reachable but no reGATE zones payload on the configured prefix.

zones_empty.title: No reGATE zones received
zones_empty.description: No MQTT message was received on the zones topic after 5 minutes for reGATE at {host}. Check that the hub is online and the MQTT prefix matches your installation.

mqtt_disconnected.title: reGATE MQTT disconnected
mqtt_disconnected.description: Home Assistant could not maintain the MQTT connection to reGATE at {host} for 10 minutes. Entities are unavailable. Reload the integration from Settings if the hub is back online.

mqtt_stale.title: reGATE MQTT silent
mqtt_stale.description: MQTT is connected to reGATE at {host} but no message was received for 15 minutes. The hub may be frozen or the prefix may be wrong.

unsupported_profile.title: Unsupported reGATE MQTT profile
unsupported_profile.description: Roles **{roles}** are detected on your reGATE but not exposed in Home Assistant yet (planned — see roadmap). Download diagnostics from the integration page for a pre-filled GitHub issue link.

mqtt_not_connected.message: MQTT connection to reGATE is not available. Try reloading the integration.

mqtt_no_device.message: No HVAC device is mapped for this command.

init.title: Zones
init.description: Select climatic zones to expose in Home Assistant.

data.telemetry: Notify me about new or unsupported devices (anonymized; pre-filled GitHub link only — nothing sent without your click)

zones.title: Zone configuration
zones.description: Name, key and suggested area for each zone.
